title: Language Smoke Report
description: The deterministic, schema-validated report `language_smoke_report.py` writes. Gated on a TRIPLE identity (particle_config content, this project's own extracted-source-text sample, and the report script's own version) -- reusing an unmodified language preset for a DIFFERENT book still requires its own fresh smoke test. W3's gate treats a missing report, ANY of the three hash mismatches, a has_elision disagreement with the currently-resolved language file, or pass:false as FATAL, blocking W4/W5. The low-name-density and zero-candidate escape hatches, and the particle-smoke decoupling from name density, are documented, procedurally-enforced relaxations of the default 10-name floor -- not silent relaxations -- and the checked_names-count-equals-candidate_names_total count-equality check (entry-count, dedup-blind -- not distinct-name coverage) is enforced by the script itself (cross-checking one field's count against another isn't schema-expressible).

particle_config_sha1.description: sha1 of the exact, resolved particle_config file content (one leg of the triple identity).

source_sample_sha1.description: sha1 of this project's own extracted-source-text sample, AFTER whitespace-run normalization (another leg of the triple identity).

smoke_report_contract_hash.description: sha1 of language_smoke_report.py's own bytes, so a stale report from a since-fixed older script version is never silently trusted (the third leg of the triple identity).

source_sample_selection.description: Records exactly how the sample was assembled: the stratified selection method, the chosen segments (each with its anchor and kind), and the total word count after the 750-word-per-anchor cap.

candidate_names_total.description: Distinct proper-noun candidates bootstrap_names.py finds in the sample -- drives the low-name-density and zero-candidate branches.

passed.description: true only if the script's OWN PARTICLES/STOPWORDS classification for this token agrees with the human-supplied is_particle.

low_name_density_confirmed.description: true when candidate_names_total < 10 and --low-name-density-confirmed was passed.

no_names_confirmed.description: true when candidate_names_total == 0 and --no-names-confirmed was passed (always accompanied by low_name_density_confirmed:true).

particle_list_size.description: The resolved language preset's own PARTICLES list length.

no_particles_confirmed.description: true when particle_list_size == 0 (genuinely particle-free language) and --no-particles-confirmed was passed.

has_elision.description: Copied from the RESOLVED particle_config file (never from profile.yml, which has no such field). W3's gate treats disagreement with the currently-resolved language file as fatal.

pass.description: true ONLY if every checked name was found AND every elision test passed AND every particle-smoke case (when present) passed.
